source.title: Old-School Essentials Advanced Fantasy Player's Tome v1.3; Carcass Crawler Exclusive Inaugural Issue; Carcass Crawler Issues #1-#4; Carcass Crawler Issue #5; Carcass Crawler Issue #6
source.scope: Clean classProfile data for OSE Advanced Fantasy classes and Carcass Crawler class/race-as-class material through Issue #4.; Carcass Crawler Issue #5 ratling and changeling demihuman classProfiles; Carcass Crawler Issue #6 dwarf brewmaster and dwarf runesmith demihuman classProfiles
source.note: Clean rebuild updated through Carcass Crawler Issue #4. Includes class identity, requirements, XP progression, equipment permissions, languages, restrictions, active/passive abilities, skill systems, spellcasting hooks/progressions where class-defining, level-gated features, and domain features. THAC0 and saving throws remain omitted unless directly needed for class ability logic. Updated through Carcass Crawler Issue #5, adding the Ratling class and confirming the Issue #5 Changeling class details. Updated through Carcass Crawler Issue #6, adding Dwarf Brewmaster and Dwarf Runesmith, including their XP progressions, brewing/forge-craft systems, rune magic, and runes of power.

classProfiles.name: Assassin
classProfiles.roleSummary: Covert killer specializing in infiltration, disguise, poison, stealth, and lethal ambush.
classProfiles.xpBonusRule: Use class prime requisite XP bonus rule.

activeAbilities.name: Assassination
activeAbilities.effect: +4 to hit; target saves vs death with level penalty or dies.
limits: Humans/demihumans any level; humanoids up to 4+1 HD; nonliving immune
activeAbilities.scaling: Penalty improves from 0 to -6 by level.

activeAbilities.name: Disguise
activeAbilities.effect: Each observer has 2% chance to detect; repeated daily.

activeAbilities.name: Poison Expertise
activeAbilities.effect: Victim saves at -2.

skillSystems.name: Assassin Skills

skills.name: Assassination
skills.effect: Death save penalty by level.

skills.name: Climb Sheer Surfaces
skills.effect: Roll per 100' climbed.

skills.name: Hear Noise
skills.effect: Listen at doors.

skills.name: Hide in Shadows
skills.effect: Hide while motionless.

skills.name: Move Silently
skills.effect: Sneak unnoticed.

skillSystems.progression: See OSE Advanced Fantasy Assassin skill table.

domainFeatures.name: Guild Takeover
domainFeatures.effect: May take over assassin or thief guild by killing old guildmaster.

classProfiles.name: Barbarian
classProfiles.roleSummary: Fierce tribal warrior with wilderness survival, stealth, anti-magic instincts, and combat resilience.
classProfiles.xpBonusRule: Use class prime requisite XP bonus rule.
restrictions: Refuses most magic except tribal divine magic.

activeAbilities.name: Cure Poison
activeAbilities.effect: Herbs grant second save vs natural poison.

activeAbilities.name: Muster Horde
activeAbilities.effect: Calls 250 1st-level fighters per level above 7 for a purpose.

passiveAbilities.name: Agile Fighting
passiveAbilities.effect: AC bonus improves at levels 4,6,8,10.

passiveAbilities.name: Foraging and Hunting
passiveAbilities.effect: Party forages 2-in-6, hunts 5-in-6.

passiveAbilities.name: Strike Invulnerable Monsters
passiveAbilities.effect: Can hit creatures harmed only by magic.

skillSystems.name: Barbarian Wilderness Skills

skills.name: Climb Natural Surfaces
skills.effect: Climb natural sheer surfaces.

skills.name: Hide in Undergrowth
skills.effect: Hide motionless in wilderness.

skills.name: Move Silently
skills.effect: Sneak in wilderness.

skillSystems.progression: See OSE Advanced Fantasy Barbarian table.

classProfiles.name: Bard
classProfiles.roleSummary: Druidic minstrel with anti-charm, enchantment, lore, languages, and divine nature magic.
classProfiles.xpBonusRule: Use class prime requisite XP bonus rule.

activeAbilities.name: Anti-Charm
activeAbilities.effect: Allies within 90' are immune to charm and sleep effects while the bard performs. Creatures already charmed or asleep may make a new saving throw.

activeAbilities.name: Enchantment
activeAbilities.trigger: Play for at least one round
activeAbilities.effect: Fascinates up to 2d6 HD of creatures within 60' that can hear; creatures may save vs spells to resist. Fascinated creatures stand motionless. Any attack breaks the effect.

activeAbilities.name: Charm Fascinated Subjects
activeAbilities.effect: Fascinated creatures that fail a second save vs spells are charmed as per a charm person/monster spell for as long as the bard continues to perform and for 1 turn thereafter.

activeAbilities.name: Lore
activeAbilities.effect: Chance to know lore about legends, monsters, magic items, and historical events. Base chance 1-in-6 at 1st level, improving by level.

passiveAbilities.name: Language Learning
passiveAbilities.effect: Learns one additional language per two levels gained.

classProfiles.name: Cleric
classProfiles.roleSummary: Divine spellcaster and undead-turner with armour, blunt weapons, and temple stronghold potential.
classProfiles.xpBonusRule: Use class prime requisite XP bonus rule.

activeAbilities.name: Turn Undead
activeAbilities.effect: Turns or destroys undead. Roll 2d6 and consult the Turn Undead table; affected undead flee for 3d6 rounds or are destroyed. Chaotic clerics may instead control undead.

activeAbilities.name: Magical Research
activeAbilities.effect: May create new spells, research spell scrolls, brew potions, and enchant magic items. Costs time and gold; referee adjudicates.

classProfiles.name: Drow
classProfiles.roleSummary: Dark elf warrior-priest with cleric magic, spider affinity, infravision, and light sensitivity.
classProfiles.xpBonusRule: Use class prime requisite XP bonus rule.

activeAbilities.name: Detect Secret Doors
activeAbilities.effect: 2-in-6 chance to detect hidden or secret doors when actively searching.

activeAbilities.name: Listen at Doors
activeAbilities.effect: 2-in-6 chance to hear noises through doors or walls.

activeAbilities.name: Magical Research
activeAbilities.effect: May create spells, brew potions, and enchant magic items aligned with shadow and spider magic. Costs time and gold; referee adjudicates.

passiveAbilities.name: Ghoul Paralysis Immunity
passiveAbilities.effect: Immune to the paralysing touch of ghouls.

passiveAbilities.name: Infravision 90'
passiveAbilities.effect: Can see in total darkness to a range of 90'.

passiveAbilities.name: Light Sensitivity
passiveAbilities.effect: -1 to attack rolls and saves when in bright light (sunlight or equivalent).

passiveAbilities.name: Spider Affinity
passiveAbilities.effect: Spiders and spider-like creatures ignore the drow unless magically commanded to attack or the drow attacks first.

spellcasting.summary: divine cleric spells; web from level 3

classProfiles.name: Druid
classProfiles.persona: The Neutral Guardian of the Wild
classProfiles.roleSummary: Neutral nature priest with druidic magic, identification, resistances, pass without trace, and shape change.
classProfiles.xpBonusRule: Use class prime requisite XP bonus rule.

activeAbilities.name: Identify Nature
activeAbilities.effect: Identifies plants, animals, pure water, and whether an area has been affected by curse or blight. Automatic for natural phenomena; referee may call for a roll for unusual cases.

activeAbilities.name: Shape Change
activeAbilities.effect: Assumes the form of one natural animal (normal or giant). Gains that creature's movement and special senses but retains own HD, saves, and mental abilities. Lasts until the druid chooses to revert.

activeAbilities.name: Magical Research
activeAbilities.effect: May create new spells, brew potions, and enchant items attuned to nature. Costs time and gold; referee adjudicates.

passiveAbilities.name: Energy Resistance
passiveAbilities.effect: +2 bonus to saving throws against fire and lightning.

passiveAbilities.name: Sylvan Languages
passiveAbilities.effect: Speaks the secret language of woodland creatures; can converse with any normal woodland animal.

passiveAbilities.name: Pass Without Trace
passiveAbilities.effect: Leaves no trail in natural surroundings and cannot be tracked by non-magical means.

passiveAbilities.name: Path-Finding
passiveAbilities.effect: 1-in-6 chance of becoming lost in wilderness is reduced to nil. Party following the druid also benefits.

passiveAbilities.name: Charm Immunity
passiveAbilities.effect: Immune to charm effects cast by sylvan creatures such as dryads, nixies, and pixies.

classProfiles.name: Dwarf
classProfiles.roleSummary: Hardy underground warrior with stonework detection, trap sense, infravision, and clan stronghold.
classProfiles.xpBonusRule: Use class prime requisite XP bonus rule.

activeAbilities.name: Detect Construction Tricks
activeAbilities.effect: 2-in-6 chance to detect new construction, unsafe walls, ceilings, or floors, sliding walls, and sloping passages when searching.

activeAbilities.name: Detect Room Traps
activeAbilities.effect: 2-in-6 chance to detect large non-magical room traps (pit traps, falling blocks, etc.) when searching.

activeAbilities.name: Listen at Doors
activeAbilities.effect: 2-in-6 chance to hear noises through doors or walls.

passiveAbilities.name: Infravision 60'
passiveAbilities.effect: Can see in total darkness to a range of 60'.

classProfiles.name: Elf
classProfiles.roleSummary: Fighter-mage demihuman with arcane magic, secret door detection, infravision, and forest stronghold.
classProfiles.xpBonusRule: Use class prime requisite XP bonus rule.

activeAbilities.name: Detect Secret Doors
activeAbilities.effect: 2-in-6 chance to detect hidden or secret doors when actively searching. Passive 1-in-6 chance when simply passing by.

activeAbilities.name: Listen at Doors
activeAbilities.effect: 2-in-6 chance to hear noises through doors or walls.

activeAbilities.name: Magical Research
activeAbilities.effect: May create new spells, brew potions, and enchant magic items. Costs time and gold; referee adjudicates.

passiveAbilities.name: Ghoul Paralysis Immunity
passiveAbilities.effect: Immune to the paralysing touch of ghouls.

passiveAbilities.name: Infravision 60'
passiveAbilities.effect: Can see in total darkness to a range of 60'.

classProfiles.name: Fighter
classProfiles.roleSummary: Dedicated martial class trained in all weapons and armour.
classProfiles.xpBonusRule: Use class prime requisite XP bonus rule.

passiveAbilities.name: Complete Martial Training
passiveAbilities.effect: May use all armour, shields, and weapons. May use a shield and one-handed weapon simultaneously, or wield a two-handed weapon.

classProfiles.name: Gnome
classProfiles.roleSummary: Small illusion-casting demihuman with defensive bonuses, tunnelling senses, hiding, and burrowing mammal affinity.
classProfiles.xpBonusRule: Use class prime requisite XP bonus rule.

activeAbilities.name: Detect Construction Tricks
activeAbilities.effect: 2-in-6 chance to detect new construction, sliding walls, or sloping passages when searching.

activeAbilities.name: Hiding
activeAbilities.trigger: Remain motionless in undergrowth, shadow, or rocky cover
activeAbilities.effect: Base 3-in-6 chance to hide; referee rolls in secret.

activeAbilities.name: Listen at Doors
activeAbilities.effect: 2-in-6 chance to hear noises through doors or walls.

activeAbilities.name: Magical Research
activeAbilities.effect: May create illusion-themed spells, brew potions, and enchant items. Costs time and gold; referee adjudicates.

passiveAbilities.name: Defensive Bonus
passiveAbilities.effect: +2 bonus to AC when attacked by opponents larger than human-sized.

passiveAbilities.name: Infravision 90'
passiveAbilities.effect: Can see in total darkness to a range of 90'.

passiveAbilities.name: Burrowing Mammal Speech
passiveAbilities.effect: Speaks the secret language of burrowing mammals (badgers, moles, rabbits, etc.) and may request information or minor aid from them.

classProfiles.name: Half-Elf
classProfiles.roleSummary: Flexible warrior with limited arcane spellcasting and elven senses.
classProfiles.xpBonusRule: Use class prime requisite XP bonus rule.

activeAbilities.name: Detect Secret Doors
activeAbilities.effect: 2-in-6 chance to detect hidden or secret doors when actively searching.

passiveAbilities.name: Infravision 60'
passiveAbilities.effect: Can see in total darkness to a range of 60'.

classProfiles.name: Halfling
classProfiles.roleSummary: Small defensive skirmisher with missile accuracy, hiding, and Shire-building.
classProfiles.xpBonusRule: Use class prime requisite XP bonus rule.

activeAbilities.name: Hiding
activeAbilities.effect: 90% chance to hide in natural surroundings; 2-in-6 chance to hide in dungeons or urban environments when motionless. Referee rolls in secret.

activeAbilities.name: Listen at Doors
activeAbilities.effect: 2-in-6 chance to hear noises through doors or walls.

passiveAbilities.name: Defensive Bonus
passiveAbilities.effect: +2 bonus to AC when attacked by opponents larger than human-sized.

passiveAbilities.name: Initiative Bonus
passiveAbilities.effect: +1 bonus to individual initiative rolls.

passiveAbilities.name: Missile Attack Bonus
passiveAbilities.effect: +1 bonus to all missile weapon attack rolls.

classProfiles.name: Half-Orc
classProfiles.roleSummary: Martial rogue with back-stab, infravision, stealth, pickpocketing, and bandit stronghold.
classProfiles.xpBonusRule: Use class prime requisite XP bonus rule.

activeAbilities.name: Back-Stab
activeAbilities.effect: +4 to hit; damage multiplied by ×2.

passiveAbilities.name: Infravision 60'
passiveAbilities.effect: Can see in total darkness to a range of 60'.

classProfiles.name: Illusionist
classProfiles.roleSummary: Specialist arcane spellcaster focused on illusion, deception, and indirect control.
classProfiles.xpBonusRule: Use class prime requisite XP bonus rule.

activeAbilities.name: Magical Research
activeAbilities.effect: May create new illusion spells, brew potions, and enchant magic items. Costs time and gold; referee adjudicates.

classProfiles.name: Knight
classProfiles.roleSummary: Mounted warrior bound to liege and code; excels at mounted combat and morale.
classProfiles.xpBonusRule: Use class prime requisite XP bonus rule.

activeAbilities.name: Assess Steeds
activeAbilities.effect: Identifies the quality, health, temperament, and approximate value of any horse, warhorse, or similar mount. Takes one round.

activeAbilities.name: Urge Great Speed
activeAbilities.effect: Mount moves at double normal speed for one turn; mount must rest one full turn afterward.

activeAbilities.name: Train Flying Mount
activeAbilities.effect: May train a captured pegasus, hippogriff, or similar flying creature as a mount over the course of several weeks. Referee determines training time and difficulty.

passiveAbilities.name: Mounted Combat
passiveAbilities.effect: Does not suffer the normal -1 penalty to attack rolls when fighting from horseback. Gains +1 to attack rolls when charging with a lance.

passiveAbilities.name: Hospitality
passiveAbilities.effect: When travelling, may always request food and lodging at any castle or noble household without payment, as befits a knight's status.

passiveAbilities.name: Fear Immunity
passiveAbilities.effect: Immune to magical fear effects.

passiveAbilities.name: Fear Support
passiveAbilities.effect: Allies within 30' are also immune to magical fear while the knight is present and able to act.

passiveAbilities.name: Beguilement Resistance
passiveAbilities.effect: +2 bonus to saving throws against charm, suggestion, and other beguilement effects.

classProfiles.name: Magic-User
classProfiles.roleSummary: Fragile spell-book caster using arcane magic, scrolls, research, and tower apprenticeship.
classProfiles.xpBonusRule: Use class prime requisite XP bonus rule.

activeAbilities.name: Magical Research
activeAbilities.effect: May create new spells, brew potions, and enchant magic items. Costs time and gold; referee adjudicates.

classProfiles.name: Paladin
classProfiles.roleSummary: Lawful sacred warrior with healing, disease immunity, undead turning, holy warhorse, vows, and late cleric magic.
classProfiles.xpBonusRule: Use class prime requisite XP bonus rule.

activeAbilities.name: Lay on Hands
activeAbilities.effect: Heals 2 hit points per paladin level by touch. May instead cure disease once per week at the cost of the day's healing.

activeAbilities.name: Cure Disease
activeAbilities.effect: Cures one disease in a touched creature. Using this ability expends the paladin's Lay on Hands for that day.

activeAbilities.name: Turn Undead
activeAbilities.effect: Turns or destroys undead as a cleric of equal level. Roll 2d6 and consult the Turn Undead table; affected undead flee for 3d6 rounds or are destroyed.

activeAbilities.name: Summon Holy Warhorse
activeAbilities.effect: Summons a specially bred, divinely blessed warhorse (treat as a heavy warhorse with maximum hit points). The horse is loyal and fearless; if slain, it cannot be summoned again.

passiveAbilities.name: Disease Immunity
passiveAbilities.effect: Immune to all forms of disease, mundane and magical.

classProfiles.name: Ranger
classProfiles.roleSummary: Secretive protector with awareness, tracking, hunting, pursuit, wilderness stealth, and late druidic magic.
classProfiles.xpBonusRule: Use class prime requisite XP bonus rule.

activeAbilities.name: Tracking
activeAbilities.effect: 1-in-6 base chance to track creatures over hard ground; 2-in-6 over soft ground; 3-in-6 over mud or snow. Chance improves with level.

passiveAbilities.name: Awareness
passiveAbilities.effect: Surprised only on a 1-in-6 (rather than the normal 2-in-6) when in the wilderness.

passiveAbilities.name: Foraging and Hunting
passiveAbilities.effect: Party can forage for food on a 2-in-6 chance per day; can hunt for sufficient food for the party on a 5-in-6 chance per day in wilderness.

passiveAbilities.name: Pursuit
passiveAbilities.effect: When tracking, may move at normal speed without penalty to tracking chance. Quarry moving at running speed imposes only a -1 penalty.

passiveAbilities.name: Wilderness Stealth
passiveAbilities.effect: May hide in natural outdoor surroundings on a 3-in-6 chance while motionless. Referee rolls in secret.

classProfiles.name: Thief
classProfiles.roleSummary: Stealthy specialist with back-stab, climbing, traps, locks, sneaking, pickpocketing, languages, scroll use, and guild potential.
classProfiles.xpBonusRule: Use class prime requisite XP bonus rule.

activeAbilities.name: Back-Stab
activeAbilities.effect: +4 to hit and double damage.

activeAbilities.name: Read Languages
activeAbilities.effect: 80% chance to read non-magical text in any language; retry after next level only.

activeAbilities.name: Scroll Use
activeAbilities.effect: Cast arcane scrolls with 10% chance of error.

skillSystems.name: Thief Skills

skills.name: Climb Sheer Surfaces
skills.effect: Roll per 100' climbed; failure falls at halfway point.

skills.name: Find/Remove Treasure Traps
skills.effect: One roll to find and one to remove; one attempt per trap.

skills.name: Hear Noise
skills.effect: Listen at doors or for approaching sounds.

skills.name: Hide in Shadows
skills.effect: Hide while motionless.

skills.name: Move Silently
skills.effect: Sneak unnoticed.

skills.name: Open Locks
skills.effect: Requires thieves' tools; one try per lock until next level.

skills.name: Pick Pockets
skills.effect: Penalty for victims above 5th; roll over twice chance is noticed.

skillSystems.playerKnowledgeRule: Referee rolls Hear Noise, Hide in Shadows, and Move Silently.

domainFeatures.name: Thief Den
domainFeatures.effect: Attracts 2d6 1st-level apprentice thieves; may form guild.

classProfiles.name: Beast Master
classProfiles.sourceBook: Carcass Crawler Exclusive Inaugural Issue; Carcass Crawler Issue #3
classProfiles.roleSummary: Warrior with animal companions, animal communication, animal reaction bonus, track identification, and companion clairvoyance.
classProfiles.xpBonusRule: Use class prime requisite XP bonus rule.

activeAbilities.name: Forge Animal Companion Bond
activeAbilities.trigger: Spend one week with a willing or tamed animal
activeAbilities.effect: Forms a permanent empathic bond with one animal companion. The companion obeys simple commands, fights alongside the Beast Master, and shares an empathic link allowing transmission of strong emotions and general direction/distance. Only one bond may be active at a time.

activeAbilities.name: Identify Tracks
activeAbilities.effect: Identifies the creature type, number, direction of travel, and approximate age of tracks on a 2-in-6 base chance (improving by level). On a success, may also determine the creature's general health or burden.

activeAbilities.name: Clairvoyance
activeAbilities.effect: Perceives through the senses of the bonded animal companion. Lasts while concentrating; range is 1 mile per Beast Master level.

passiveAbilities.name: Animal Reaction Bonus
passiveAbilities.effect: Reaction rolls from normal (non-magical) animals are made at +2. Animals that would normally attack on a hostile reaction may instead hesitate.

passiveAbilities.name: Speak with Animals
passiveAbilities.effect: May communicate with any normal (non-magical) animal, exchanging simple concepts such as what the animal has seen, heard, or smelled nearby.

domainFeatures.name: Domain Feature
domainFeatures.effect: Wilderness stronghold; animals within 5 miles become friends

classProfiles.name: Warden
classProfiles.roleSummary: Non-magical ranger variant with awareness, foraging, hunting, pursuit, surprise attack, tracking, and followers.
classProfiles.xpBonusRule: Use class prime requisite XP bonus rule.

activeAbilities.name: Surprise Attack
activeAbilities.effect: +4 to hit on the first attack when striking an opponent who is unaware of the Warden's presence in a wilderness setting.

activeAbilities.name: Tracking
activeAbilities.effect: 2-in-6 base chance to track creatures over hard ground; 3-in-6 over soft ground; 4-in-6 over mud or snow. Chance improves with level. May identify creature type, number, and direction from spoor.

passiveAbilities.name: Awareness
passiveAbilities.effect: Surprised only on a 1-in-6 (rather than the normal 2-in-6) when in wilderness or natural terrain.

passiveAbilities.name: Foraging and Hunting
passiveAbilities.effect: Party can forage for food on a 2-in-6 chance per day; can hunt for sufficient food for the party on a 5-in-6 chance per day in wilderness.

passiveAbilities.name: Pursuit
passiveAbilities.effect: When tracking, may move at normal speed without penalty to tracking chance. Quarry moving at running speed imposes only a -1 penalty to the tracking roll.

passiveAbilities.name: Limited Possessions
passiveAbilities.effect: May own no more than can be carried on the person or loaded on a single mount. Cannot own land, buildings, or hire permanent retainers. XP penalties apply if this restriction is violated.

skills.name: Tracking
skills.effect: Track with modifiers for ground, group size, mingled tracks, age, rain, and concealment.

classProfiles.name: Mage
classProfiles.roleSummary: A non-Vancian arcane class using percentile magical skills, scroll casting, scroll scribing, healing, deep magic armour, and a staff that harms invulnerable monsters.
classProfiles.xpBonusRule: INT 13+ and WIS 13+ grant +5% XP; INT 16+ and WIS 13+ grant +10% XP.
restrictions: Cannot memorize spells; magic is not bound by spell books or memorization.

activeAbilities.name: Healing
activeAbilities.effect: Heals an ally for 1 hp per mage level or allows another save against a negative effect such as a curse or poison.

activeAbilities.name: Mage Staff Light
activeAbilities.effect: Staff radiates light in a 30-foot radius for 1 turn per mage level.

activeAbilities.name: Scribe Scrolls
activeAbilities.effect: Can create scrolls of arcane spells using the standard rules for duplicating spell effects.

activeAbilities.name: Magical Research
activeAbilities.effect: May scribe arcane scrolls or research other magical effects. From 9th level may create other magic items.

passiveAbilities.name: Mage Armour
passiveAbilities.effect: Deep magic grants +2 bonus to Armour Class.

passiveAbilities.name: Mage’s Staff
passiveAbilities.effect: A normal staff in the mage’s hands can harm creatures immune to mundane attacks.

skillSystems.name: Mage Skills

skills.name: Detect Magic
skills.effect: 1 turn concentration on object within 30 feet; failed checks may be retried with more time.

skills.name: Open/Close
skills.effect: Opens or pushes closed unlocked door, portal, lid, etc. within 30 feet and holds it open/closed for 1 round per level; one attempt per portal.

skills.name: Rally/Fear
skills.effect: Rally counters magical fear; fear forces enemies to make morale check. Once per turn.

skills.name: Read Magic
skills.effect: Deciphers magical scripts and runes. Failed attempts cannot be retried until gaining a level.

skills.name: Suggestion
skills.effect: Words gain supernatural potency. Up to 1 HD of persons per mage level within 30 feet save vs spells or follow suggestion for 1 round per level. Dangerous suggestions auto-save; targets realize trick afterward. Once per turn.

skillSystems.playerKnowledgeRule: Referee should roll Detect Magic because the mage does not always know whether the object being scanned is magical.

spellcasting.spellList: No memorized spell list; casts arcane spells from scrolls and uses mage skills
spellcasting.preparationMethod: Percentile magical skills plus scroll casting
rules: Can cast arcane spells from scrolls.
Can use arcane caster magic items.
Can scribe arcane scrolls at any level.

magicItemUse: Items usable only by arcane spell casters, such as magic wands

levelGatedFeatures.name: Create Magic Items
levelGatedFeatures.effect: May create magic items other than scrolls.

domainFeatures.name: Mage Stronghold
domainFeatures.effect: May build a stronghold, often a great tower. 1d6 apprentices of levels 1–3 arrive to study under the mage.

classProfiles.name: Wood Elf
classProfiles.roleSummary: A reclusive forest elf with druidic divine magic, stealth, missile expertise, foraging and hunting, heightened awareness, secret-door senses, infravision, ghoul paralysis immunity, and a treetop stronghold.
classProfiles.xpBonusRule: DEX 13+ and WIS 13+ grant +5% XP; DEX 16+ and WIS 13+ grant +10% XP.
restrictions: Cannot wear armour heavier than leather due to need for stealth and free movement.
Must remain faithful to alignment and religion or may suffer deity disfavour.

activeAbilities.name: Detect Secret Doors
activeAbilities.effect: Detects hidden and secret doors with a 2-in-6 chance.

activeAbilities.name: Hiding
activeAbilities.effect: Can hide with 90% chance of success.

activeAbilities.name: Listen at Doors
activeAbilities.effect: Hears noises with a 2-in-6 chance.

activeAbilities.name: Magical Research
activeAbilities.effect: May create new spells or other magical effects associated with their deity; from 9th level may create magic items.

passiveAbilities.name: Awareness
passiveAbilities.effect: Only surprised on a roll of 1; may act in a surprise round while companions are surprised.

passiveAbilities.name: Foraging and Hunting
passiveAbilities.effect: Party with a wood elf succeeds at foraging on 2-in-6 and finds prey while hunting on 5-in-6.

passiveAbilities.name: Immunity to Ghoul Paralysis
passiveAbilities.effect: Unaffected by ghoul paralysis.

passiveAbilities.name: Infravision
passiveAbilities.effect: Infravision 60 feet.

passiveAbilities.name: Missile Attack Bonus
passiveAbilities.effect: +1 bonus to attack rolls with all missile weapons.

spellcasting.spellList: Druid spell list; if Advanced Fantasy is not used, cleric spell list with cure light wounds unavailable until level 2
rules: Must remain faithful to alignment and religion or risk deity disfavour.
May use magic scrolls of spells on the wood elf spell list.
May use items usable only by divine spellcasters, such as some staves.
From 9th level may create magic items.

magicItemUse: Divine spell scrolls from wood elf spell list
Items usable only by divine spellcasters, such as some staves

levelGatedFeatures.name: Create Magic Items
levelGatedFeatures.effect: May create magic items through magical research.

levelGatedFeatures.name: Treetop Stronghold
levelGatedFeatures.effect: May construct a treetop stronghold in the depths of the forest.

domainFeatures.name: Treetop Forest Stronghold
domainFeatures.effect: May construct an exquisite wooden treetop stronghold in a site of great natural beauty; costs as much as similar stone construction. Forest animals within 5 miles become friends, may warn of intruders and carry messages/news, and must be protected. May only hire elven mercenaries; specialists and retainers may be any race.
